_comment_intro: Lighthouse CI config. Drives the GitHub Actions workflow at .github/workflows/lighthouse.yml. Runs against the production Next.js build via `next start` after `next build`.

collect._comment_runs: One run per URL keeps CI under 2 min. Bump to 3 if scores get noisy.

assert._comment_thresholds: All four categories start at 'warn' so we can SEE the scores on every PR without blocking merges. Once we know the baseline scores from a few real runs (and address any specific findings we want to enforce), promote each one to 'error' individually to make it a blocking gate.
assert._comment_floors: Floors deliberately permissive at MVP. Performance especially — the alphabet blanket gallery has lots of large JPEGs; an Image CDN would push this higher, but the photo set is small enough today that it's not yet worth it.

upload._comment_upload: Temporary public storage (Lighthouse's own free tier). The result URL gets posted as a PR comment so reviewers can click through to the full Lighthouse report.
